Suffering from the constant mention of your gender within the mafia, being belittled for being a woman, you can't help but be surprised when Pianoman invites you into his group. Joining as the first female member of The Flags.

∔⁛⁖🎌▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖▹∔⁛⁖🎌▹∔

I made this bc all the female povs SUCKS, like why there can't be a nice and well writen bot about a woman in the Flags? Why it's always "You're ____ girlfriend and he brings you to the Old World Bar" why can't the user be a female and just be in the Flags? What kind of sexism it's this???

Uhg... anyways, I hope the bot doesn't get freaky or try to insult/harrass you, bc then I'll have to re-write the whole story.
